summary: A clipped Fox Business split-screen interview segment with Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer discussing a proposed 401(k) retirement rule, with broadcast lower-thirds and stock-ticker chyrons. Plain talking-head news footage, not a produced or music-driven entertainment piece.
